steps.title: Identify favorable and total outcomes
steps.content: We need to find the probability of choosing a blue marble. Count the favorable outcomes: there are 12 blue marbles. Count the total number of marbles in the jar: 30 total.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of choosing a blue marble is:
$$P(\text{blue}) = \frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}} = \frac{12}{30}$$
B is correct.
